original_image_tags: Black-and-white document page, likely from a report or book. The right margin features a column of black rectangular stamps or punch holes. The text is printed in a serif font and organized into paragraphs and numbered sections.

elements.description: A scanned page of typed text with no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts. The text contains three sections titled '14.2 What Attitudes do the Media Adopt?' and '14.3 What Should Be Done?', along with preceding paragraphs discussing UFO media coverage, panic, mistrust, and fear of ridicule. Black rectangular artifacts appear along the right margin.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains no visual content (photographs, sketches, etc.), only typed text and black rectangular artifacts along the right margin.
